title: B1 Core: expand answers naturally
subtitle: Move from correct to complete.
overview: A B1 answer usually has 3-5 connected sentences.
Use answer, reason, example, personal detail, closing.

items.es: La respuesta corta es que sí, me gustaría vivir en otra ciudad.
items.en: The short answer is yes, I would like to live in another city.

items.es: Lo digo porque me interesa conocer otra cultura desde dentro.
items.en: I say this because I am interested in knowing another culture from the inside.

items.es: En mi caso, también sería una oportunidad para practicar el idioma todos los días.
items.en: In my case, it would also be an opportunity to practice the language every day.

items.es: Por eso, aunque sería difícil al principio, creo que valdría la pena.
items.en: That is why, although it would be difficult at first, I think it would be worth it.

items.es: No lo haría para siempre, pero sí durante un tiempo.
items.en: I would not do it forever, but yes for a while.
